title: Ninjago Elements
description: Adds in the main core elements from the series lego ninjago
body:
This mod adds in the core elements (fire, ice, water, earth, lightning) from the series Lego Ninjago into minecraft
DIsclaimer i do not in any way own lego ninjago itself obviously
this mod contains a dynamic leveling system so you can become stronger with practice
the mod also contains scrolls which allow you to select a specific elemental power, unfortunately they are only in the creative menu or /give command
this mod is for people who want to play ninjago in minecraft bassically
